```
     1	export type ExcalidrawSnapshot =
     2	  | { type: 'inline'; data: Record<string, any> }
     3	  | { type: 'remote'; url: string }
     4	  | { type: 'delta'; baseUrl: string; delta: object }
     5	
     6	export function parseSnapshot(raw: string): ExcalidrawSnapshot | null {
     7	  if (!raw || !raw.trim()) return null
     8	
     9	  try {
    10	    const json = JSON.parse(raw)
    11	    if (json && typeof json === 'object') return { type: 'inline', data: json }
    12	  } catch {
    13	    // not JSON — check for URL/ref
    14	  }
    15	
    16	  const lines = raw.split('\n')
    17	  const firstLine = lines[0].trim()
    18	
    19	  if (
    20	    !firstLine.startsWith('http') &&
    21	    !firstLine.startsWith('blob:') &&
    22	    !firstLine.startsWith('ref:')
    23	  )
    24	    return null
    25	
    26	  const remaining = lines.slice(1).join('\n').trim()
    27	  if (remaining) {
    28	    try {
    29	      const delta = JSON.parse(remaining)
    30	      if (delta && typeof delta === 'object')
    31	        return { type: 'delta', baseUrl: firstLine, delta }
    32	    } catch {
    33	      // not valid JSON delta — treat as plain remote
    34	    }
    35	  }
    36	
    37	  return { type: 'remote', url: firstLine }
    38	}
    39	
    40	export function serializeSnapshot(snapshot: ExcalidrawSnapshot): string {
    41	  switch (snapshot.type) {
    42	    case 'inline':
    43	      return JSON.stringify(snapshot.data)
    44	    case 'remote':
    45	      return snapshot.url
    46	    case 'delta':
    47	      return [snapshot.baseUrl, JSON.stringify(snapshot.delta)].join('\n')
    48	  }
    49	}
```

```
    10	  error: string

    16	
    17	type ParsedData =
    18	  | { type: 'empty' }

    20	  | { type: 'remote'; fetchUrl: string; refLine: string }
    21	  | { type: 'incremental'; fetchUrl: string; refLine: string; delta: object }

    23	
    24	function resolveUrl(
    25	  url: string,
    26	  apiUrl: string | undefined,
    27	): { fetchUrl: string; refLine: string } | { error: string } {
    28	  const refLine = url
    29	  if (url.startsWith('http') || url.startsWith('blob:')) {
    30	    return { fetchUrl: url, refLine }
    31	  }
    32	  if (url.startsWith('ref:') && apiUrl) {
    33	    return { fetchUrl: `${apiUrl}/objects/${url.slice(4)}`, refLine }
    34	  }
    35	  return {
    36	    error: url.startsWith('ref:')
    37	      ? 'Missing apiUrl for ref resolution'
    38	      : 'Unrecognized snapshot format',

    40	}
    41	
    42	function typedToParsed(
    43	  typed: ExcalidrawSnapshot,
    44	  apiUrl: string | undefined,
    45	): ParsedData {
    46	  switch (typed.type) {
    47	    case 'inline':
    48	      return { type: 'inline', snapshot: typed.data }
    49	    case 'remote': {
    50	      const result = resolveUrl(typed.url, apiUrl)
    51	      if ('error' in result) return { type: 'error', error: result.error }
    52	      return { type: 'remote', fetchUrl: result.fetchUrl, refLine: result.refLine }
    53	    }
    54	    case 'delta': {
    55	      const result = resolveUrl(typed.baseUrl, apiUrl)
    56	      if ('error' in result) return { type: 'error', error: result.error }
    57	      return {
    58	        type: 'incremental',

    60	        refLine: result.refLine,
    61	        delta: typed.delta,

    73	export function useExcalidrawData(
```

```
import { useEffect, useMemo, useState } from 'react'

import { useTldrawConfig } from './TldrawConfigContext'

interface TldrawDataState {
  snapshot: Record<string, any> | undefined
  loading: boolean
  error: string
}

export function useTldrawData(data: string): TldrawDataState {
  const { apiUrl } = useTldrawConfig()

  const parsed = useMemo(() => {
    if (!data) return { type: 'empty' as const }

    try {
      const json = JSON.parse(data)
      if (json && typeof json === 'object') {
        return {
          type: 'inline' as const,
          snapshot: json as Record<string, any>,
        }
      }
    } catch {
      // not JSON
    }

    const firstLine = data.split('\n')[0].trim()
    let fetchUrl: string | undefined

    if (firstLine.startsWith('http')) {
      fetchUrl = firstLine
    } else if (firstLine.startsWith('ref:') && apiUrl) {
      fetchUrl = `${apiUrl}/objects/${firstLine.slice(4)}`
    }

    if (fetchUrl) {
      return { type: 'remote' as const, fetchUrl }
    }

    return {
      type: 'error' as const,
      error: firstLine.startsWith('ref:')
        ? 'Missing apiUrl for ref resolution'
        : 'Unrecognized snapshot format',
    }
  }, [data, apiUrl])

  const fetchUrl = parsed.type === 'remote' ? parsed.fetchUrl : undefined

  const [remoteSnapshot, setRemoteSnapshot] = useState<
    Record<string, any> | undefined
  >()
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(!!fetchUrl)
  const [error, setError] = useState('')

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!fetchUrl) return

    let cancelled = false
    setLoading(true)
    setError('')

    fetch(fetchUrl)
      .then((res) => {
        if (!res.ok) throw new Error(`HTTP ${res.status}`)
        return res.json()
      })
      .then((json) => {
        if (!cancelled) {
          setRemoteSnapshot(json)
          setLoading(false)
        }
      })
      .catch((err) => {
        if (!cancelled) {
          setError(err instanceof Error ? err.message : 'Failed to load')
          setLoading(false)
        }
      })

    return () => {
      cancelled = true
    }
  }, [fetchUrl])

  if (parsed.type === 'inline') {
    return { snapshot: parsed.snapshot, loading: false, error: '' }
  }

  if (parsed.type === 'remote') {
    return { snapshot: remoteSnapshot, loading, error }
  }

  if (parsed.type === 'error') {
    return { snapshot: undefined, loading: false, error: parsed.error }
  }

  return { snapshot: undefined, loading: false, error: '' }
}
```

```
import { useColorScheme } from '@haklex/rich-editor'
import { presentDialog, SegmentedControl } from '@haklex/rich-editor-ui'
import { usePortalTheme } from '@haklex/rich-style-token'
import { Clipboard, Download, Pencil, Upload, X } from 'lucide-react'
import type { FC } from 'react'
import { useCallback, useEffect, useRef, useState } from 'react'

import * as css from './styles.css'
import { useTldrawConfig } from './TldrawConfigContext'
import { useTldrawData } from './useTldrawData'

export interface TldrawEditRendererProps {
  snapshot: string
  onSnapshotChange: (snapshot: string) => void
}

const SAVE_DEBOUNCE_MS = 2000

// ── Dialog content (fullscreen editor) ──────────────────────────

const TldrawEditorDialogContent: FC<{
  dismiss: () => void
  TldrawComponent: FC<any>
  initialData: Record<string, any> | undefined
  initialSnapshot: string
  theme: 'light' | 'dark'
  onSave: (ref: string) => void
  saveSnapshot?: (snapshot: object) => Promise<string>
  onClose: (doc?: Record<string, any>) => void
}> = ({
  dismiss,
  TldrawComponent,
  initialData,
  initialSnapshot,
  theme,
  onSave,
  saveSnapshot,
  onClose,
}) => {
  const { className: portalClassName } = usePortalTheme()
  const editorRef = useRef<any>(null)
  const saveTimerRef = useRef<ReturnType<typeof setTimeout>>(undefined)
  const [isDirty, setIsDirty] = useState(false)
  const isDirtyRef = useRef(false)
  const [storageMode, setStorageMode] = useState<'inline' | 'remote'>(() => {
    if (!saveSnapshot || !initialSnapshot || !initialSnapshot.trim())
      return 'inline'
    try {
      JSON.parse(initialSnapshot)
      return 'inline'
    } catch {
      return 'remote'
    }
  })
  const storageModeRef = useRef(storageMode)
  const [savedRef, setSavedRef] = useState(() => {
    if (!saveSnapshot || !initialSnapshot || !initialSnapshot.trim()) return ''
    try {
      JSON.parse(initialSnapshot)
      return ''
    } catch {
      return initialSnapshot
    }
  })
  const [isSaving, setIsSaving] = useState(false)

  useEffect(() => {
    return () => {
      if (saveTimerRef.current) clearTimeout(saveTimerRef.current)
    }
  }, [])

  const performSave = useCallback((): Promise<void> => {
    if (saveTimerRef.current) clearTimeout(saveTimerRef.current)
    const editor = editorRef.current
    if (!editor) return Promise.resolve()
    try {
      const doc = editor.store.getSnapshot()
      if (storageModeRef.current === 'remote' && saveSnapshot) {
        setIsSaving(true)
        return saveSnapshot(doc).then(
          (ref) => {
            onSave(ref)
            isDirtyRef.current = false
            setIsDirty(false)
            setIsSaving(false)
            setSavedRef(ref)
          },
          () => {
            setIsSaving(false)
          },
        )
      } else {
        onSave(JSON.stringify(doc))
        isDirtyRef.current = false
        setIsDirty(false)
      }
    } catch {
      // ignore
    }
    return Promise.resolve()
  }, [onSave, saveSnapshot])

  const handleMount = useCallback(
    (editor: any) => {
      editorRef.current = editor
      editor.user.updateUserPreferences({ colorScheme: theme })
      editor.store.listen(
        () => {
          isDirtyRef.current = true
          setIsDirty(true)
          if (saveTimerRef.current) clearTimeout(saveTimerRef.current)
          saveTimerRef.current = setTimeout(
            () => performSave(),
            SAVE_DEBOUNCE_MS,
          )
        },
        { scope: 'document' },
      )
    },
    [theme, performSave],
  )

  const handleSaveAndClose = useCallback(() => {
    void performSave().then(() => {
      const editor = editorRef.current
      onClose(editor?.store.getSnapshot())
      dismiss()
    })
  },
```

```
import type { SlashMenuItemConfig } from '@haklex/rich-editor'
import type { EditorConfig, LexicalEditor, LexicalNode, NodeKey } from 'lexical'
import { $getNodeByKey, $insertNodes } from 'lexical'
import { PenTool } from 'lucide-react'
import type { ReactElement } from 'react'
import { createElement, lazy, Suspense } from 'react'

import { type SerializedTldrawNode, TldrawNode } from './TldrawNode'

const LazyDisplayRenderer = lazy(() =>
  import('./TldrawDisplayRenderer').then((m) => ({
    default: m.TldrawDisplayRenderer,
  })),
)
const LazyEditRenderer = lazy(() =>
  import('./TldrawEditRenderer').then((m) => ({
    default: m.TldrawEditRenderer,
  })),
)

export class TldrawEditNode extends TldrawNode {
  static slashMenuItems: SlashMenuItemConfig[] = [
    {
      title: 'Whiteboard',
      icon: createElement(PenTool, { size: 20 }),
      description: 'Tldraw whiteboard canvas',
      keywords: ['tldraw', 'whiteboard', 'draw', 'canvas'],
      section: 'MEDIA',
      onSelect: (editor) => {
        editor.update(() => {
          $insertNodes([$createTldrawEditNode('{}')])
        })
      },
    },
  ]

  static clone(node: TldrawEditNode): TldrawEditNode {
    return new TldrawEditNode(node.__snapshot, node.__key)
  }

  constructor(snapshot: string, key?: NodeKey) {
    super(snapshot, key)
  }

  static importJSON(serializedNode: SerializedTldrawNode): TldrawEditNode {
    return new TldrawEditNode(serializedNode.snapshot)
  }

  decorate(editor: LexicalEditor, _config: EditorConfig): ReactElement {
    const nodeKey = this.__key
    const isEditable = editor.isEditable()

    const fallback = createElement('div', {
      className: 'rich-tldraw-loading',
      style: {
        position: 'relative',
        width: '100%',
        aspectRatio: '16 / 10',
        margin: '1rem 0',
      },
    })

    if (isEditable) {
      return createElement(
        Suspense,
        { fallback },
        createElement(LazyEditRenderer, {
          snapshot: this.__snapshot,
          onSnapshotChange: (newSnapshot: string) => {
            editor.update(() => {
              const node = $getNodeByKey(nodeKey) as TldrawNode | null
              if (node) {
                node.setSnapshot(newSnapshot)
              }
            })
          },
        }),
      )
    }

    return createElement(
      Suspense,
      { fallback },
      createElement(LazyDisplayRenderer, { snapshot: this.__snapshot }),
    )
  }
}

export function $createTldrawEditNode(snapshot: string): TldrawEditNode {
  return new TldrawEditNode(snapshot)
}

export function $isTldrawEditNode(
  node: LexicalNode | null | undefined,
): node is TldrawEditNode {
  return node instanceof TldrawEditNode
}
```

```
import type {
  EditorConfig,
  LexicalEditor,
  LexicalNode,
  NodeKey,
  SerializedLexicalNode,
  Spread,
} from 'lexical'
import { DecoratorNode } from 'lexical'
import type { ReactElement } from 'react'
import { createElement } from 'react'

import { TldrawSSRRenderer } from './TldrawSSRRenderer'

export type SerializedTldrawNode = Spread<
  { snapshot: string },
  SerializedLexicalNode
>

export class TldrawNode extends DecoratorNode<ReactElement> {
  __snapshot: string

  static getType(): string {
    return 'tldraw'
  }

  static clone(node: TldrawNode): TldrawNode {
    return new TldrawNode(node.__snapshot, node.__key)
  }

  constructor(snapshot: string, key?: NodeKey) {
    super(key)
    this.__snapshot = snapshot
  }

  createDOM(_config: EditorConfig): HTMLElement {
    const div = document.createElement('div')
    div.className = 'rich-tldraw-wrapper'
    return div
  }

  updateDOM(): boolean {
    return false
  }

  isInline(): boolean {
    return false
  }

  static importJSON(serializedNode: SerializedTldrawNode): TldrawNode {
    return $createTldrawNode(serializedNode.snapshot)
  }

  exportJSON(): SerializedTldrawNode {
    return {
      ...super.exportJSON(),
      type: 'tldraw',
      snapshot: this.__snapshot,
      version: 1,
    }
  }

  getSnapshot(): string {
    return this.__snapshot
  }

  setSnapshot(snapshot: string): void {
    const writable = this.getWritable()
    writable.__snapshot = snapshot
  }

  decorate(_editor: LexicalEditor, _config: EditorConfig): ReactElement {
    return createElement(TldrawSSRRenderer, {
      snapshot: this.__snapshot,
    })
  }
}

export function $createTldrawNode(snapshot: string): TldrawNode {
  return new TldrawNode(snapshot)
}

export function $isTldrawNode(
  node: LexicalNode | null | undefined,
): node is TldrawNode {
  return node instanceof TldrawNode
}
```
